_publications._publicationTitle: Susceptible stages in Schwann cells for NF1-associated plexiform neurofibroma development.

_contextSnippet: The E12.5 PLPCre-ERT2;NF1 flox/− ;R26R progeny showed classic signs of illness beginning at 5 to 6-months of age and were necropsied along with control littermates. In all cases, the mice exhibited tumors along the cervical and thoracic DRG
details: 100% of E12.5 tamoxifen-induced PLPCre-ERT2;NF1 flox/− mice developed plexiform neurofibromas at 5-6 months of age
